---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, feature, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is Your Feature Related to a Problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Skill Proposal (if applicable)
If this is a new skill request:
- **Name**: (e.g., github-mcp, kubernetes-mcp)
- **Description**: What does this skill do?
- **Upstream Source**: Where is this skill/tool originally from?
- **Permissions Needed**:
  - Network domains (if any):
  - Filesystem paths (if any):
  - Subprocess allowlist (if any):
  - Environment variables (if any):
- **Use Case**: Who would use this and why?
- **GitHub/Repository Link**: (if publicly available)

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references here.

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks many workflows)
- [ ] High (improves major use case)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic or niche)
